footer.privacy: All tools run 100% in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

metadata.title: NexusTools — Free Developer Tools
metadata.description: Free online developer tools: favicon generator, JSON formatter, meta tag generator, and more. Fast, private, runs in your browser.
metadata.keywords: developer tools, favicon generator, json formatter, meta tag generator, free online tools

home.heading: Free Developer Tools
home.subheading: Fast, private, open-source tools that run entirely in your browser. No uploads, no tracking, no accounts.
home.feature1Desc: Your data never leaves your device. All processing happens locally in your browser.
home.feature2Desc: Just open and use. No sign-ups, no email harvesting, no paywalls.
home.feature3Desc: Lightweight tools that load instantly. Free forever, supported by minimal ads.

faviconGenerator.name: Favicon Generator
faviconGenerator.description: Generate favicons from text, emoji, or images. Download as ICO, PNG, SVG with all required sizes.

jsonFormatter.name: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON. Syntax highlighting, error detection, and tree view.

metaTagGenerator.name: Meta Tag Generator
metaTagGenerator.description: Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Cards. Live preview of Google and social media results.

base64Encoder.name: Base64 Encoder & Decoder
base64Encoder.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text. Supports UTF-8 and URL-safe variants.

colorConverter.name: Color Converter
colorConverter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL. Visual color picker with live preview and CSS output.

cssUnitConverter.name: CSS Unit Converter
cssUnitConverter.description: Convert between px, rem, em, %, vh, and vw. Customizable base font size and viewport dimensions.

hashGenerator.name: Hash Generator
hashGenerator.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from any text. Instant, private, and browser-based.

urlEncoder.name: URL Encoder & Decoder
urlEncoder.description: Encode special characters for URLs or decode percent-encoded strings. Supports encodeURIComponent and encodeURI modes.

regexTester.name: Regex Tester
regexTester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time match highlighting, capture groups, flags, and a quick reference cheat sheet.

loremIpsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
loremIpsum.description: Generate customizable placeholder text — paragraphs, sentences, or words. Copy as plain text or HTML.

uuidGenerator.name: UUID Generator
uuidGenerator.description: Generate UUID v4 and v1 identifiers. Bulk generation, validation, and version detection. Copy instantly.

jwtDecoder.name: JWT Decoder
jwtDecoder.description: Decode JSON Web Tokens to inspect header, payload, and claims. Check expiration status and copy decoded data.

timestampConverter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Supports seconds, milliseconds, timezones, and relative time.

markdownPreview.name: Markdown Preview
markdownPreview.description: Live Markdown editor with instant preview. Supports GFM syntax including tables, code blocks, and lists.

cssGradientGenerator.name: CSS Gradient Generator
cssGradientGenerator.description: Create beautiful CSS gradients visually. Linear and radial types, color stops, presets, and instant CSS output.

diffChecker.name: Diff Checker
diffChecker.description: Compare two texts side by side. See additions, deletions, and unchanged lines highlighted with diff statistics.

passwordGenerator.name: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate strong, random passwords with customizable length, character types, and entropy-based strength meter.

qrCodeGenerator.name: QR Code Generator
qrCodeGenerator.description: Generate QR codes from any text or URL. Customize colors and size, download as PNG or SVG.

cronExpressionBuilder.name: Cron Expression Builder
cronExpressionBuilder.description: Build cron expressions visually with field editors. Human-readable descriptions, next execution preview, and presets.

jsonCsvConverter.name: JSON to CSV Converter
jsonCsvConverter.description: Convert JSON arrays to CSV or CSV back to JSON. Custom delimiters, nested object flattening, and instant download.

textCaseConverter.name: Text Case Converter
textCaseConverter.description: Convert text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, and 6 more formats.

placeholderImage.name: Placeholder Image Generator
placeholderImage.description: Generate custom placeholder images with any dimensions, colors, and text overlay. Download PNG or copy data URL.

sqlFormatter.name: SQL Formatter
sqlFormatter.description: Format, beautify, and minify SQL queries. Syntax highlighting, configurable indentation, and keyword casing.

jsonYamlConverter.name: JSON to YAML Converter
jsonYamlConverter.description: Convert between JSON and YAML formats. Bidirectional, configurable indentation, inline arrays support.

chmodCalculator.name: Chmod Calculator
chmodCalculator.description: Calculate Unix file permissions visually. Interactive checkbox grid, octal and symbolic notation, common presets.

boxShadowGenerator.name: Box Shadow Generator
boxShadowGenerator.description: Create CSS box-shadow visually. Multiple shadow layers, color picker, inset toggle, and ready-to-copy CSS.

borderRadiusGenerator.name: Border Radius Generator
borderRadiusGenerator.description: Design CSS border-radius visually. Independent corner control, px and % units, shape presets, live preview.

aspectRatioCalculator.name: Aspect Ratio Calculator
aspectRatioCalculator.description: Calculate aspect ratios from dimensions. Lock ratio, common presets, resolution table, and CSS output.
